fr:mainmatter.fr:p: We are trying to check that the following morphism is an identity:

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Unitality of the induced monad algebra

fr:mainmatter.fr:p: Let \mathbb {T} be a monad on a category \mathcal {C}, and let X be a weak algebra for \mathbb {T} for which the algebra map is invertible by { X } \xrightarrow {{ \pi _{ X } }}{ T X }. Then the induced monad algebra \bar { X } is unital.
We are trying to check that the following morphism is an identity:
